summary: Editable D2 JSON draft for human review.
general_information: The NEW GOLDEN BRIDGE VII is a passenger vessel built by Hyundai Mipo Dockyard Co., Ltd. in Korea, with a gross tonnage of 30,322gt and a deadweight of 7,241dwt. It has a length of 196.13m, breadth of 27.00m, and depth of 9.40m to main deck. The vessel is designed for passenger and vehicle transportation between China and Korea, with a service speed of 23.50knots.

standard.name: DNV_GMOD_INTERNAL_DEFAULT
standard.description: Default maritime taxonomy used by the application for vessel data extraction, validation and classification.
standard.rule: AI must classify extracted data using this taxonomy first. Missing categories must be proposed as extensions, not invented as final nodes.
